channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Dr. Ekua Amoakoh Defends NPP Record on Afari Military Hospital Amid Renewed Political Debate
item.description: Dr. Ekua Amoakoh, the New Patriotic Party (NPP) spokesperson on health, has pushed back against claims that the NPP failed to make progress on the Afari Military Hospital project during its eight year...

item.title: Rep. Claudia Tenney Draws Criticism After Raising Antisemitism Concerns Ahead of Knicks Championship Parade
item.description: Representative Claudia Tenney, a Republican from New York and a supporter of former President Donald Trump, sparked confusion and criticism after comments she made on Fox Business regarding celebratio...

item.title: CNN Panel Challenges Conservative Commentator's Defense of Trump's Iran Negotiations
item.description: A heated discussion on CNN centered on former President Donald Trump's approach to diplomacy with Iran and claims about potential agreements between the two countries. During a roundtable segment host...

item.title: Georgia GOP gubernatorial runoff: Trump-endorsed candidate Burt Jones defeated by businessman Rick Jackson
item.description: In Georgia’s Republican gubernatorial runoff, voters delivered a notable setback to President Donald Trump’s influence within the state GOP. Businessman Rick Jackson defeated Lieutenant Governor Burt ...

item.title: Cape Verde Holds Spain to a Scoreless Draw Behind Veteran Goalkeeper Vozinha
item.description: Cape Verde produced one of the most surprising results of the World Cup by holding Spain to a 0-0 draw in Atlanta. Entering the match as overwhelming underdogs, the African nation relied on a discipli...

item.title: Mike Pence Criticizes Trump's Reported Iran Deal and Opposes Sanctions Relief
item.description: Former Vice President Mike Pence publicly criticized President Donald Trump's reported Iran agreement during an interview with CNN's Kaitlan Collins. Although the full details of the agreement have no...

item.title: Shiv Sena (UBT) MP Urges Lok Sabha Speaker Not to Recognise Any Breakaway Group Amid Reports of Possible Defection by MPs
item.description: Shiv Sena (UBT) MP Arvind Sawant has written to Lok Sabha Speaker Om Birla requesting that no recognition, privileges, status, or facilities be granted to any group claiming to represent the party sep...

item.title: Congressional Staff Say Federal Prison Officials Provided Few Answers About Ghislaine Maxwell's Transfer and Treatment
item.description: Congressional staff members representing the House Oversight and Judiciary Committees visited the Federal Prison Camp in Bryan, Texas, where Ghislaine Maxwell is currently incarcerated, seeking inform...

item.title: Jen Psaki Highlights Controversies Surrounding Georgia Senate Candidate Mike Collins
item.description: During an episode of MS NOW's 'The Briefing,' host Jen Psaki criticized Georgia Congressman Mike Collins after Georgia Republicans selected him as their candidate to challenge Democratic Senator Jon O...

item.title: Collection of 35 Mid-Century American Beach Travel Posters Showcasing Coastal Tourism Destinations
item.description: This article presents a curated collection of 35 vintage American beach posters created during the 1950s and 1960s, a period often regarded as the golden age of travel and tourism advertising in the U...

item.title: Long-term African migrants in Durban displaced amid xenophobic violence
item.description: A wave of xenophobic violence in Durban, South Africa, has forced many African migrants, including long-term residents, to flee their homes and businesses. Among them is Princess Adjei, a 33-year-old ...

item.title: NASA’s Nancy Grace Roman Space Telescope Nears August Launch to Map the Universe and Study Dark Energy
item.description: NASA is preparing to launch its next major space observatory, the Nancy Grace Roman Space Telescope, following nearly two decades of development and an investment of about $4.3 billion. Scheduled for ...

item.title: Susan Collins Defends Her Vote to Confirm Brett Kavanaugh Despite Disagreement With Roe v. Wade Decision
item.description: Sen. Susan Collins of Maine defended her 2018 vote to confirm Supreme Court Justice Brett Kavanaugh during her re-election campaign, saying she does not regret supporting his nomination even though sh...

item.title: Political analyst criticizes use of JD Vance to defend Trump’s inflation remarks
item.description: A political analyst criticized the Trump campaign’s decision to have Vice President JD Vance publicly defend recent controversial remarks about inflation, describing the move as a strategically poor c...

item.title: Performance artists use soccer referee personas to promote pedestrian safety at a busy Toronto intersection
item.description: Two Toronto performance artists are drawing attention to pedestrian safety by acting as unofficial 'traffic referees' at the intersection of Richmond and Peter streets in downtown Toronto during rush ...

item.title: FBI Disrupts Alleged Drone and Sniper Plot Targeting White House UFC Event; Suspects Held Extremist Views
item.description: Federal authorities have charged five men in connection with an alleged plot to attack a UFC event held at the White House as part of America's 250th anniversary celebrations. The suspects, including ...

item.title: Analysis Argues Trump's More Aggressive Policy Ambitions Have Lost Momentum Amid Legal and Political Obstacles
item.description: An analysis by The Bulwark's Andrew Eggers argues that some of the most controversial and expansive proposals associated with President Donald Trump's administration are showing signs of losing moment...

item.title: Authors Call for a National Strategy to Strengthen Canada's Digital Sovereignty and AI-Driven Economy
item.description: In this opinion article, Don Tapscott and Alex Tapscott argue that Canada has reached a pivotal moment as it faces two major forces: the emergence of a new geopolitical order and the rapid advancement...

item.title: Analyst Questions JD Vance's 2028 Presidential Prospects Following Appearance on 'The View'
item.description: A political discussion surrounding Vice President JD Vance intensified after his appearance on the television program 'The View.' During a CNN segment with Kasie Hunt, Jonah Goldberg, editor-in-chief ...

item.title: Rare Childhood Photographs and Early Life of Tupac Shakur in 1970s New York
item.description: This article presents a collection of 32 childhood photographs of Tupac Shakur and explores the circumstances that shaped his early years during the 1970s. Born Lesane Parish Crooks on June 16, 1971, ...
